description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

【Event held】On Saturday, March 7, 2026 (Reiwa 8), we held an unveiling ceremony to install a "Moominmamma" object in the free passage of Higashi-Hanno Station. This is the second installation following Hanno Station, connecting the two gateway entrances to the Hanno area with Moomin.

We expect this installation to further accelerate "town-building that makes people want to walk," starting from the station, and to drive vitality in the central shopping district and throughout the city. It will also help foster local residents' civic pride and enhance the sense of excitement among visitors.

The "Moomin Town, Hanno" Project Promotion Council will continue to roll out various initiatives to improve foot traffic and create greater bustle in the area.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/sogoseisakubu/kikakuka/sangakukanrenkei/13206.html
summary: ℹ️ Higashi-Hanno Station 'New Moomin Object' Unveiling Ceremony — Event Held
